description: The quality of continuing steadfastly despite obstacles, maintaining effort through difficulties with patient determination. Perseverance encompasses sustained practice, the courage to continue when progress is invisible, faith in gradual transformation, and the deep strength found in commitment.
rationale: The word 'thona' combines the thoughtful, enduring 'tho' with the grounded certainty of 'na'. The fricative beginning suggests effort against resistance, while 'na' provides the solid foundation that makes continuation possible. Together they embody steady, grounded persistence.
